comment: Seed evidence-based DSIs (compact input shape; the server builds PlanDefinitions via lib/DsiModel.buildPlanDefinition). criteria follows lib/criteria.js.

interventions.title: Contrast allergy contraindication
interventions.description: Flags contrast-enhanced imaging orders for patients with a documented contrast allergy.
interventions.bibliographicCitation: ACR Manual on Contrast Media, v2023. American College of Radiology.

action.title: Possible contrast allergy
action.message: Patient has a documented contrast allergy. Review premedication / non-contrast alternatives before proceeding.

interventions.title: Duplicate imaging advisory
interventions.description: Advises review when a patient already has procedures on record that may duplicate a new imaging order.
interventions.bibliographicCitation: ACR Appropriateness Criteria. American College of Radiology.

action.title: Possible duplicate imaging
action.message: This patient has prior procedures on record. Confirm this imaging is not a duplicate before ordering.

interventions.title: Colorectal cancer screening reminder (USPSTF)
interventions.description: Reminds the ordering clinician about USPSTF colorectal cancer screening for adults aged 45 and older.
interventions.bibliographicCitation: US Preventive Services Task Force. Colorectal Cancer: Screening. 2021.

action.title: Colorectal screening due
action.message: Patient is 45+. Confirm colorectal cancer screening is up to date per USPSTF guidance.
